title: Knicks Tracker
lede: Review upcoming fixtures and recent historical scoring based on localised data.

sections.title: Upcoming Schedule
sections.description: Next five fixtures using static data.

sections.title: Recent Scoring Logs
sections.description: Points scored across the last five starts.

demoSteps: Run the local start command to boot the web view.
Observe the 5-game schedule table rendering deterministically.
Check the scoring bar chart to ensure Jalen's points are plotted correctly.
Verify the highlights section displays 31.2 for L5 and 33.7 for L3, along with the positive threshold flag.
notes: Ensure all UI copy uses UK English spelling (e.g., 'favour', 'localised').
Keep visual styling minimal and data-dense without decorative elements.
V1 strictly relies on local fixture files; build the architecture so a real API can be swapped in for V2.
